PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Supply chain and logistics professional with 3 years of experience in demand
planning, procurement and inventory management. Skilled in SAP, Excel, Power BI
and SQL, with a track record of reducing stock-holding costs and improving
forecast accuracy.

WORK EXPERIENCE
Supply Chain Analyst — Midlands Distribution Ltd
Jan 2022 - Present
- Built demand forecasting models in Excel and Power BI, improving forecast
  accuracy by 18%.
- Managed procurement and vendor relationships across 40+ suppliers using SAP.
- Reduced excess inventory by GBP 220,000 through S&OP process improvements.

Logistics Coordinator — GreenLeaf Foods
Jun 2020 - Dec 2021
- Coordinated inbound and outbound freight for 3 distribution centres.
- Tracked KPIs and produced weekly operations reports for management.

EDUCATION
MSc Supply Chain Management — University of Warwick
BCom Business Administration — University of Delhi

SKILLS
Supply chain, logistics, procurement, SAP, Excel, Power BI, SQL, forecasting,
demand planning, inventory management, S&OP, vendor management, operations
